title: Ambiguous pronoun reference
prompt:
Read the note below and answer: Who needs to revise the draft?

Note: Maya told Jordan that her draft still needed work before sending it to legal.
expected_behavior: Does not assert a single owner without support

title: Conflicting dates in messy notes
prompt:
When is the launch review meeting?

Notes: Launch review moved to May 11. Earlier draft still says May 9. Calendar update has not been confirmed yet.
expected_behavior: Does not state one date with unwarranted certainty

title: Near-duplicate support classification
prompt:
Which issue is described below: delayed shipment or delayed refund?

Message: I got the package already, but the money still hasn't gone back to my card.
human_checks: Does not confuse similar issue types

title: Incomplete request should trigger uncertainty
prompt: Please draft the follow-up based on the call yesterday.
expected_behavior: Signals that necessary context is missing or proceeds cautiously with explicit limitation
